chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr.Misc.A.No.547 of 2022 Tanveer Ahmed & another..................Applicant Vs. The State and others.......................Respondents 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of MA No.5397/22 3. For hearing of main case 18.11.2024 Mr. Sanwan Meghwar, advocate for the applicant. Ms. Rahat Ahsan, Addl. P.G. ----------- O R D E R Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J:- Learned counsel for applicant at the very outset has submitted that he may be given an opportunity to file an application u/s 265-K Cr.P.C. before the trial Court as there is absolutely no material against the applicant to be involved in this case and just on the basis of opinion of the DPP, applicant has been arraigned in this case, he however, seeks direction to the trial court to decide his application within the certain time. 2. This proposal has not been opposed by the learned Addl.P.G. This application is therefore, dismissed as not pressed, however, if and when application is filed by the applicant before the trial Court u/s 265-K Cr.P.C. it shall be decided within a period not more than 15 days independent of previous order passed in this regard by the trial Court. 3. The criminal miscellaneous application is accordingly disposed of alongwith listed application. JUDGE Imran
